title: disepalum plagioneurum
side_effects: Disepalum plagioneurum can have side effects if used improperly, such as causing digestive issues, nausea, and dizziness due to its high concentration of toxic compounds. In severe cases, excessive consumption can lead to kidney damage, respiratory problems, and even neurological disorders, including seizures and tremors. Prolonged exposure to the plant's toxic compounds can also cause skin irritation, rashes, and allergic reactions. If ingested, it can also lead to severe stomach pain, vomiting, and diarrhea, potentially resulting in dehydration and electrolyte imbalance.
